data.name: Portfolio-Website
data.description: I used an open source template to made by personal portfolio website currently live on umer-mujahid.vercel.app. Feel free to reach out and make your own.

data.name: Github-Dev-Card-Generator
data.description: I made a Github Dev Card Generator which generates high profile aesthetic summary card based on your profile using React Frontend and Python Backend. Used Gemini 2.5 flash model for LLM integration, MCP server for github extraction and will deploy it on vercel.

data.name: AI-Models-Semester-Project
data.description: 6th Semester Project involving training CNN 2D, Bi-LSTM models form scratch and Fine-Tuning MobileNetV2 model for classification and regression purposes.

data.name: Blood-Trace
data.description: This is a specialized health-tech platform / service typically used for blood donation through a visual map-based interface enabling live location, real time data updates and simplified UI.

data.name: Blood-Trace-UI-UX-Design
data.description: A UI/UX focused Blood Donor Visual System. Made keeping in mind user requirements, and Nielsen's AHCI components.

data.name: HireX-AI-Recruitment-System
data.description: HIREX is an advanced recruitment management solution enabled with automated parsing and intelligent candidate matching.

data.name: Email-Analyzer
data.description: An intelligent tool that securely scans your inbox to automatically identify, rank, and summarize valuable opportunities like job offers and sponsorships.

data.name: Nexora-Company
data.description: A website of a technology and consulting firm that focuses on digital transformation, software development, and providing innovative IT solutions for various business sectors.

data.name: NLP-Project-Clinical-Inheritance-Patterns
data.description: An NLP framework for extracting family medical history and inferring hereditary disease risk from unstructured clinical text using Transformers (BioBERT), Deep Learning, and ML

data.name: Flappy-Bird-in-x86-Assembly
data.description: Flappy Bird in 8086 Assembly using Mode 13h, with real-time input, collision detection, and multitasking-based background sound.

data.description: Shopping mall owners can manage finances, employees, and shops, subscriptions through this management system.
